title: tephroseris papposa subsp. heuffelii
intro: Tephroseris papposa subsp. heuffelii, also known as Heuffel's tephroseris or Heuffel's mountain everlasting, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tephroseris papposa subsp. heuffelii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
